measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the v5 companion adds a generated hypothesis-boundary lens slot and a compact cross-hypothesis render audit strip while preserving the material, coordinate, embodied-stack, and selected-failure render lanes.

visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 40 remains the theory failure-mode map and page 42 starts the reproducibility media manifest; no float displacement was observed in the accepted 45-page build.
